title: Anthropic's Labs Lead On Fable's Capabilities + Building AI-Native Products — With Mike Krieger
summary: Mike Krieger, head of Anthropic Labs and Instagram co-founder, discusses Fable and Mythos, Anthropic's frontier models that were pulled from the market following government action. Krieger shares observations on how Fable changes development workflows and addresses Anthropic's approach to safety, platform positioning, and competitive dynamics in AI product building.
writeup: Mike Krieger, head of Anthropic Labs and Instagram co-founder, discusses Fable and Mythos, Anthropic's frontier models that were pulled from the market after government action. He describes how Fable changes development workflows and lays out Anthropic's approach to safety, platform positioning, and competitive dynamics in AI product building. The conversation matters because it ties model capabilities to the practical work of building AI-native products, including agents and infrastructure.
